channel.title: GEOP Operating Permit Guidelines on Maharlikanism
channel.description: Recent content in GEOP Operating Permit Guidelines on Maharlikanism

item.title: Definition of Policy
item.description: Section 2 of RA 7638 (DOE Act of 1992) mandates the DOE to prepare, integrate, coordinate, supervise and control all plans, programs, projects and activities of the Government relative to energy exploration, development, utilization, distribution and conservation.

item.title: RE Supplier Qualifications
item.description:
Section 5. RE Supplier Qualifications

  1. Any person, natural orjuridical, registered andlor authorized to operate in the Philippines under existing Philippine laws and engaged in the business of generating and/or supplying electricity from RE Resources may apply for a GEOP Operating Permit as an RE Supplier under GEOP
